title: nuphar × fluminalis
intro: Nuphar × fluminalis, also known as the hybrid water lily, is a sterile aquatic plant that arises from the crossing of Nuphar lutea and Nuphar pumila. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Nuphar × fluminalis include relieving symptoms of urinary tract infections, reducing inflammation and pain, and acting as a natural diuretic to promote fluid balance. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its availability and use may vary depending on regional regulations and availability.
